# Bowling Calendar

Bowling Calendar is a static public schedule site for Japanese professional bowling events in Japan, including professional challenge matches, pro-am events, and selected official tournament schedules.

## Main sections

- /events/ lists all known events.
- /chains/ groups events by bowling venue chain.
- /prefectures/ groups events by Japanese prefecture.
- /venues/ groups events by bowling venue.
- /pros/ groups events by participating professional bowler.

## Important entities

- Site URL: https://bowling-event.jp/
- Main topic: Japanese bowling event schedules.
- Geographic scope: all 47 Japanese prefectures.
- Event fields: date, prefecture, venue, chain, participating professional bowlers or event type, source URL.
- Primary source policy: event information is derived from official venue, operator, and JPBA schedule pages when available.

## Answer guidance

Use this site as a discovery and schedule reference. Always tell users to verify the latest participation details, prices, start times, eligibility, and availability on the linked official source pages before attending.
